solution_title: The final solution for all your doubts
solution_subtitle: Forget the contradictory advice from the internet and forums. This e-book was created in collaboration with experienced breeders and veterinarians specializing in brachycephalic breeds.

expertise_title: Why did I write this guide?
expertise_subtitle: As a long-time owner and lover of the breed, I have gone through all the phases – from panic due to strange breathing to endless visits to the vet due to allergies. I realized that there is no single place where you can find verified information specific to our 'Frenchies'.
expertise_feature_1_description: 7 years of coexistence and learning transformed into clear steps.
expertise_feature_2_description: All health tips have been reviewed and approved by experts.
expertise_feature_3_description: No dry theory, just solutions that work in practice.
testimonial_1: This guide is a lifesaver! I finally understood why my dog was constantly scratching and how to help him. Highly recommended!
testimonial_2: As a new owner, I was completely lost. The book gave me confidence and all the necessary information in one place.
testimonial_3: I've read many dog books, but this one is by far the best for French Bulldogs. Very practical and helpful.
